originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&pid_output` is never used.

presenceCondition: (and (= MARLIN_H true) (= PIDTEMP true) (= PID_DEBUG true))
model:
(define-fun PID_DEBUG () Bool
  true)
(define-fun MARLIN_H () Bool
  true)
(define-fun PIDTEMP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: In 8c4377dd635.c: SERIAL_ECHO_START is defined only inside '#ifndef MARLIN_H' (L1-8). When MARLIN_H=T, SERIAL_ECHO_START is not defined. With PID_DEBUG=T, L16 calls SERIAL_ECHO_START → undefined identifier → compile error. This configuration (MARLIN_H=T AND PID_DEBUG=T) is non-compilable. Classification: FALSE.
